feedback.text: I believe that this could also include video games here as a lot of the points brought out in this act are also prevalent in video gaming industries. Such as Loot boxes for gambling, using secondary or tertiary currencies to obfuscate microtransaction value, Making said currency purchase either just short of the microtransaction value or bit over so that you will always have some left over. Not to mention selling a product but then pulling the plug and saying it is a service after the sale. These all fall under the four topics said in this act, so mentioning specifically video games seems fair to me.
